result.stderr:
Usage:
  fieldcure-mcp-outbox                    Start MCP server (stdio)
  fieldcure-mcp-outbox add <type>         Add a messaging channel
  fieldcure-mcp-outbox list               List configured channels
  fieldcure-mcp-outbox remove <id>        Remove a channel

Channel types: slack, telegram, gmail, outlook, microsoft365, naver, smtp, kakaotalk
